violations.text: Fried chicken and fries were observed held between 107-115 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
Inspector observed fried chicken and fries being held in a fry basked. Establishment is not approved for time as a public health control. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

(Street Corn mixture ) was observed held at (122) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated mixture to 165 or above. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, items, and fiolage were observed in the (back outside ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The floors under equipment and 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Inspector observed serving utensils being stored in sanitizer solution. PIC informed about proper storage of utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2023
The door to the employee toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

The threshold/base to the (walk-in-cooler) door is in poor repair. Inspector observed dry rot, rust and opening. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
